name: function 11
func:
let p = msg.payload;
if (!p) return null;

let loc = p.Location || {};

msg.query = `
INSERT INTO meshcore_nodes (
    public_key,
    device_name,
    device_role,
    signature,
    latitude,
    longitude,
    ts
)
VALUES ($1,$2,$3,$4,$5,$6,$7)

ON CONFLICT (public_key)
DO UPDATE SET
    device_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.device_name, meshcore_nodes.device_name),
    device_role = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.device_role, meshcore_nodes.device_role),
    signature = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.signature, meshcore_nodes.signature),
    latitude = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.latitude, meshcore_nodes.latitude),
    longitude = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.longitude, meshcore_nodes.longitude),
    ts = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.ts, meshcore_nodes.ts),
    updated_at = now()

RETURNING public_key;
`;

msg.params = [
    p.public_key ?? null,
    p["Device Name"] ?? null,
    p["Device Role"] ?? null,
    p.signature ?? null,
    loc.latitude ?? null,
    loc.longitude ?? null,
    p.Timestamp ?? null
];

return msg;

name: mise en forme message
uniquement MC@Public
uniquement frblabla
uniquement MC#emergency
uniquement MC#bot
uniquement MC#info
uniquement MC#meteo
uniquement MC#test
forme
func:
msg.payload = msg.payload.replace(/MC#fr[^ ]*/g, "MC:");
return msg;

name: date ntp
requet MC
func:
msg.query = `
SELECT
 device_name,
 device_role,
 latitude,
 longitude,
 ts
FROM meshcore_nodes
WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY ts DESC;
`;

return msg;
